name: Ironclad
description: The walking fortress. Industrial plate armor, hydraulic pistons, and a pneumatic hammer that can shatter stone. Slow to act, impossible to stop. Built to hold the line while everything else falls apart.

abilities.name: Steam Smash
abilities.description: A full-force pneumatic hammer swing. The impact sends shockwaves through enemy armor.

abilities.name: Shield Bash
abilities.description: A brutal blow with the riot shield's edge. Leverages defensive weight as offensive force.

abilities.name: Fortress Stance
abilities.description: Lock into a defensive position. Steam vents redirect to armor plating. Defense increases dramatically for 3 turns.

abilities.name: Seismic Slam
abilities.description: A shockwave hammer blow that reverberates through the ground â€” hits every enemy in the room.
